title: SICP 3.3.5 constraint-propagation system
goal: Implement the SICP 3.3.5 constraint-propagation system as a runnable Eshkol probe, including connectors, constraints, probes, adders, multipliers, constants, and Celsius/Fahrenheit conversion.
next_actions: Implement connectors with informant tracking, has-value?, get-value, set-value!, forget-value!, connect, and message dispatch.
Implement adder, multiplier, constant, probe, averager if useful, and the Celsius/Fahrenheit converter network.
Assert propagation in both directions, forgetting/retraction behavior, and contradiction handling.
acceptance: The probe passes under AOT compile/run.
ICC sicp-completeness observes sicp_ch3_constraints_r and sicp_ch3_constraints_aot as PASS.
ux_payoff: Covers SICP's constraint network model and exercises stateful message-passing objects beyond queues/accounts.
